lex.settlement/defs: {:main {:type "record", :key "tid", :record {:type "object", :required ["settlementId" "orderId" "grossMinor" "state"], :properties {:settlementId {:type "string"}, :orderId {:type "string", :description "→ vehicleOrder"}, :grossMinor {:type "integer", :description "USDC minor (6-dp)"}, :titheMinor {:type "integer", :description "10% TitheRouter auto-split → Public Fund"}, :buyerSigRef {:type "string", :description "member passkey/smart-account signature; platform holds no key (G15)"}, :state {:type "string", :description "intent|executed|refunded (escrow-refund only)"}}}}}
